headline: Forget Fixed Income: This Ultra-Safe Dividend Stock Could Be Retirees’ Best Friend
summary: If Mid-America Apartment Communities (NYSE:MAA) lives up to its billing as a retiree’s hedge against a hawkish Fed, the dividend has to be the load-bearing wall. With the 10-year Treasury at 4.49% and the Warsh Fed potentially pivoting back toward hikes, MAA’s ~4.6% yield on Sun Belt apartments needs to be durable. Let’s see if ... Forget Fixed Income: This Ultra-Safe Dividend Stock Could Be Retirees’ Best Friend
